description: Case style: Analogue chronograph watch with a stainless steel round caseDial style: White dial with copper and white coloured handsStrap style: Tan coloured synthetic leather strap with faux crocodile skin pattern and a tang claspFeatures: Three chronograph time displaysBranding on the 12 hour mark and date aperture on the dialScrew to reset timeWater resistance up to 3 ATM, wearable around accidental splashes but not swimming etcWarranty: 1 year
